texto: There should be no difficulty in understanding this love. Each one of you knows what love is. You know how restless one is to get close to whomsoever one loves; what pleasure one feels even in taking the name of the beloved and in taking that name again and again; the earnest zest with which one strives to win over one's beloved, and the extent to which one dreads the displeasure of the beloved. Just keep examining to what extent you have attained this love. Peep into your heart and see what is the place of Allah therein. The same shall be your place to Him.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Khurram Murad sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “There should be no difficulty in understanding this love. Each one of you knows what love is. You…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, islam, khurram, útil em momentos de estudos e khurram.

You know how restless one is to get close to whomsoever one loves; what pleasure one feels even in taking the name of the beloved and in taking that name again and again; the earnest zest with which one strives to win over one's beloved, and the extent to which one dreads the displeasure of the beloved. texto: Repentance and yearning, and yearning and repentance: this is the total harvest of life.
explicacao: Citação de Khurram Murad sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Repentance and yearning, and yearning and repentance: this is the total harvest of life.” articula vida, islam, khurram em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como khurram e vida.
